feat.name: Whispers in the Night
feat.text: You weave your illusions with greater ability, allowing you to play tricks and slip through the night. You can cast *darkness* and *ventriloquism* as 2nd-rank innate occult spells, each once per day.

traits.name: Goblin
traits.text: A creature with this trait is a small, frantic goblinoid. Goblins tend to have darkvision. An ability with this trait can be used or chosen only by goblins. A weapon with this trait is created and used by goblins.
